arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Red Devils eye shock Man City move as Marcus Rashford given new option
arts.sum: Manchester United could be in line for a busy few days with the January transfer window closing in less than two weeks time and it appears that they are on the verge of a number of deals

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's priority Man Utd transfer offered fresh option after holding secret talks
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is keen on bringing Ousmane Diomande to Manchester United from Sporting Lisbon but a number of Europe's top clubs are also showing an interest in the defender

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes plays 'keep or sell' with 11 Man Utd players as two summer signings axed
arts.sum: Paul Scholes has delivered a brutal verdict on Manchester United's under-performing squad, claiming he would keep just three of the 11 top stars he was questioned about

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim takes out his frustrations on Old Trafford locker room
arts.sum: Speaking after the Brighton game Amorim called on his players to do more, describing this iteration of Manchester United as “maybe the worst in history”. “I knew that it was going to be hard to put a completely new idea in the moment but when you lose games and don’t win three games in a row it becomes really hard,” Amorim continued.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs. Rangers: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between Man Utd and Rangers, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Barcelona chief Deco speaks out about potential Marcus Rashford move
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco speaks out amid reports the club are interested in signing Marcus Rashford on loan from Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Why are Man Utd struggling in Amorim's system?
arts.sum: Match Of The Day 2 pundits Leon Osman and Fara Williams discuss Manchester United's tactical struggles under new coach Ruben Amorim, as well as his stern criticism of his side after a 3-1 loss to Brighton.

arts.ttl: Papers: David, Cunha, Mbeumo, Delap on Man Utd striker shortlist
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Dundee United think catching Rangers is ON as star smells blood – 'We've got a big chance'
arts.sum: Jim Goodwin's men are sitting third and could move to within seven points of second with a win at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Man Utd target FOUR signings amid Mainoo and Garnacho exit worry
arts.sum: Man Utd are determined to sign a new forward in 2025 and they have identified four key targets amid reports that Victor Osimhen and Viktor Gyokeres are unlikely to move clubs in January. Meanwhile, Man Utd are in talks to sign Lecce star Patrick Dorgu amid their search for a new left wing-back.
